200# return «

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌝

Fighter type: Tank

Event: Winter Festival 2025

Event date: 01/12/2025

 

Write a review View reviews Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, the Herald of Cold freezes 3 random enemy units for 2 sec. During that time, frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 2 sec. The Herald of Cold also explodes all the frozen enemy units, dealing physical damage equal to 20% of the Herald's maximum health to them.

description 4/6

Once in a while, the Herald of Cold freezes 3 random enemy units for 2,5 sec. During that time, frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 2,5 sec. The Herald of Cold also explodes all the frozen enemy units, dealing physical damage equal to 25% of the Herald's maximum health to them. Once every 8 sec., the Herald of Cold removes all freezing effects from self and all allied units in a large radius around self and reduces incoming damage by 35% for 4 sec. Also makes all of the ability's targets go into a frenzy, causing them to increase in size, and all of their stats to increase by 25% for 4 sec. The Herald of Cold freezes all enemy units in a small radius around self for 3 sec. as well. During this time, frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown time of all their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec.

description 6/6

Once in a while, the Herald of Cold freezes 3 random enemy units for 3 sec. During that time, frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 3 sec. The Herald of Cold also explodes all the frozen enemy units, dealing physical damage equal to 30% of the Herald's maximum health to them. Once every 8 sec., the Herald of Cold removes all freezing effects from self and all allied units in a large radius around self and reduces incoming damage by 40% for 5 sec. Also makes all of the ability's targets go into a frenzy, causing them to increase in size, and all of their stats to increase by 30% for 5 sec. The Herald of Cold freezes all enemy units in a small radius around self for 4 sec. as well. During this time, frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown time of all their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 4 sec. Once in a while, the Herald of Cold casts the Mark of Ice upon 3 random enemy units for 5 sec. Upon receiving the mark, targets lose all shields and damage-reducing effects, and become unable to receive new ones for 5 sec. If a marked unit's health falls below 35%, the unit explodes, dealing pure damage equal to 20% of their maximum health to self and all enemy units in a large radius around them. If an enemy unit dies while being afflicted with the Mark of Ice, the Herald of Cold increases all of their stats by 10% until the end of the battle. Stacks up to 8 times. When any unit is frozen on the battlefield, the Herald of Cold explodes all enemy units with the Mark of Ice and deals magic damage equal to 25% of his maximum health to them. The effect triggers once every 2 sec.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When making frozen enemy units explode, the Herald of Cold also tears their armor. When their armor is torn, units receive 300000 pure damage, while their physical and magic armor is reduced by 35% for 4 sec. These enemy units also receive 350000 physical damage for 4 sec.

description 4/6

When making frozen enemy units explode, the Herald of Cold also tears their armor. When their armor is torn, units receive 300000 pure damage, while their physical and magic armor is reduced by 35% for 4 sec. These enemy units also receive 350000 physical damage for 4 sec. When the Herald of Cold goes into frenzy by using the set's ability, the deep freeze effect is also cast upon 2 of the farthest enemy units, units, lasting la 3 sec. During this time, the frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown time of all their abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 3 sec. When the deep freeze effect ends, the ability's targets explode, receiving 500000 magic damage, and icicles fly out of them at 2 nearest enemy units. On hit, icicles deal 350000 magic damage, increase the cooldown time of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec, and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 50% for 3 sec.

description 6/6

When making frozen enemy units explode, the Herald of Cold also tears their armor. When their armor is torn, units receive 300000 pure damage, while their physical and magic armor is reduced by 35% for 4 sec. These enemy units also receive 350000 physical damage for 4 sec. When the Herald of Cold goes into frenzy by using the set's ability, the deep freeze effect is also cast upon 2 of the farthest enemy units, lasting 3 sec. During this time, the frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown time of all their abilities (except those granted by the equipped set) is increased by 3 sec. When the deep freeze effect ends, the ability's targets explode, receiving 500000 magic damage, and icicles fly out of them at 2 nearest enemy units. On hit, icicles deal 350000 magic damage, increase the cooldown time of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec, and cast stiffness on them. The attack speed of stiffened units is reduced by 50% for 3 sec. Every second, the Herald of Cold deals pure damage equal to 10% of their maximum health to all enemy units with the Mark of Ice. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

When making frozen enemy units explode, the Herald of Cold restores health, equal to 30% of the damage dealt with the ability, to self and all allied units.

description 4/6

When making frozen enemy units explode, the Herald of Cold restores health, equal to 30% of the damage dealt with the ability, to self and all allied units. The Herald of Cold and all allied units in a large radius receive frost shields that block 1000000 damage of any type and exist up to 5 sec. When the shield is removed, or its duration ends, the unit that had the shield restores 500000 health.

description 6/6

When making frozen enemy units explode, the Herald of Cold restores health, equal to 30% of the damage dealt with the ability, to self and all allied units. The Herald of Cold and all allied units in a large radius receive frost shields that block 1000000 damage of any type and exist up to 5 sec. When the shield is removed, or its duration ends, the unit that had the shield restores 500000 health. When the Herald of Cold casts Marks of Ice upon enemy units, all stats of the Herald and all allied units are increased by 30% for 4 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

When making the frozen enemy units explode, the Herald of Cold also reduces all of their stats by 30% for 4 sec.

description 4/6

When making the frozen enemy units explode, the Herald of Cold also reduces all of their stats by 30% for 4 sec. When the Herald of Cold freezes all enemy units in a small radius by using the set's ability, all positive effects are removed from them, and new ones cannot be received for the next 4 sec.

description 6/6

When making the frozen enemy units explode, the Herald of Cold also reduces all of their stats by 30% for 4 sec. When the Herald of Cold freezes all enemy units in a small radius by using the set's ability, all positive effects are removed from them, and new ones cannot be received for the next 4 sec. When the Herald of Cold casts Marks of Ice upon enemy units, all stats of the targets' are also reduced by 25% for 4 sec., and silence is cast upon their armor, amulet and artifact. The enemy units become unable to use the armor, amulet or artifact abilities for 4 sec.

Materials

Ominous maw
Enchanted plate
Fancy braid
Rune handle
Sharp horns
Suggested gears for the set
